_comment: Named non-lexical vocalizations (efforts) for game audio — the pain/exertion/fear/death/laugh sounds no one wants to record themselves. Each maps to an ARPAbet phoneme pattern + intensity + emotion bias. `grunt synth --effort <id>` renders one. Combine with --character for who makes the sound (a yelling_man pain_death vs. an orc one). Phoneme patterns are deliberately vowel-heavy and short; the prosody/FX/character layers shape them into a believable vocalization. Edit freely — add your game's own efforts here.
